title: Luxury Fashion Brand Campaign Visual System AI
sourceTitle: Luxury Fashion Brand Campaign Visual System AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-end fashion brand campaign visual system for Maison Valeur, built around structured ivory coat, silk scarf, sculptural earrings, and leather gloves and a clear luxury editorial art direction. Subject: structured ivory coat, silk scarf, sculptural earrings, and leather gloves is the visual focus, staged with adult model in side-profile crop with calm architectural posture so the product, model presence, and brand identity feel intentional rather than generic. Scene: Premium fashion editorial environment with controlled negative space, refined surfaces, campaign-grade props, and a setting chosen to support NOVA PETCARE. Composition: Single finished campaign image, not a random collage: strong hierarchy between brand mark, hero visual, headline area, product focus, and small editorial text; composition adapts to the brand mood while staying clean and readable. Signature Elements: Editorial brand system feeling: strong art direction, premium product focus, controlled model or still-life staging, luxury magazine spacing, and fashion-campaign polish tied to NOVA PETCARE. Style: Luxury fashion magazine and premium brand campaign design with art-directed typography, elegant layout tension, polished retouching, controlled styling, and high-end commercial editorial finish. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Lighting: Soft editorial studio or natural luxury light with clean highlights on fabric, leather, jewelry, skin, or product surfaces; shadows remain intentional and expensive. Typography: Maison Valeur appears as the visible brand identity; supporting campaign text stays short, elegant, and integrated into the fashion layout without overpowering the hero image. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
